title: Write ferrum_extlib_style.md
description: CCSP lib_ccsp_style: design tokens and theming (not CSS). Not in Ferrum stdlib. Design extlib module: theme type with typography/color/geometry/motion tokens, dark variant generation, high-contrast WCAG AAA variant, runtime theme switching, explicit override model (no cascade/specificity), token-based design system API, integration with widget extlib.
